channel.title: FastAPI on Shehao Li
channel.description: Recent content in FastAPI on Shehao Li

item.title: CalendarDIFF
item.description: AI schedule-change governance runtime for ICS + Gmail with explicit state, human review, and replay-driven reliability validation.

item.title: AI Narrative Platform
item.description: Multi-turn narrative agent system where Author produces executable story packs and Play runs on a deterministic runtime with benchmarkable behavior.
